explanatory_strength.rationale: Round-two review does not change the mechanism type: the packet describes a capital-cycle deleveraging story (FY2025 OCF $3.1B, ~$4.70/sh owner-cash proxy, ~$29B debt) with four additive proof rows, not a quality-reinvestment mechanism. Moat is none, dhando is none, GAAP net income is $111M, and capex $3.8B exceeded OCF, so normalized owner earnings available for compounding at a knowable price are still not demonstrated.

evidence_sufficiency.rationale: Core operating facts still reconcile from FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q, and all four component calculation proofs remain mechanically valid with empty double_counting_flags. The targeted research loop marked the credit bridge unresolved: no year-by-year maturity schedule beyond the $3.75B current bucket, no interest expense or covenant headroom, and management_facts carries zero claims. Decision-grade gaps for this persona persist on maintenance versus growth capex, reinvestment ROIC, and AAdvantage co-brand economics (success_probability null).

downside_control.rationale: Permanent equity loss remains plausible and unbounded. Research response confirms $902M cash against $3.75B near-term maturities while FY2025 capex exceeded OCF, and the frozen packet cannot stress-refinance tranches or certify equity recovery versus dilutive issuance under credit tightening. Net debt ~$28B against $3.7B equity, levered payoff lens, dhando none, and contract low case at -$41.70/sh component value leave the bear case unbounded at the equity layer.

return_vs_alternatives.rationale: Filing-locked component base still sums to -$9.79/sh at $15.14, so contract base annualized return remains null on negative intrinsic value; high case is only 8.12% over seven years versus the 12% Buffett/Weschler hurdle. Lawrence synthesis 28.48% and bull 35% still rely on unproven levered recovery and contradict the conservative proof schedule. No evidenced path clears the owner-earnings reinvestment bar.

claims.claim: American Airlines remains outside the Buffett/Weschler quality_reinvestment power zone: capital_cycle archetype, moat none, dhando none, and a levered equity stub on ~$29B debt — not a durable compounder with reinvestable owner earnings at a knowable price.

The targeted research loop confirmed the frozen packet cannot supply year-by-year debt maturities, interest expense, or covenant headroom, so the deleveraging path required to bridge negative component intrinsic value (-$9.79/sh base) to spot price (~$15.14) remains unprovable for this persona.

Proof-first component schedule base case is -$9.79/sh ($33.88 network + $8.00 co-brand - $42.67 net financial claims - $9.00 cycle reserve) versus ~$15.14 price; contract high case 8.12% annualized fails the 12% owner-earnings hurdle, and using FY2025 OCF per share as owner cash overstates distributable earnings when capex exceeded OCF.

strongest_counter_explanation: Post-pandemic U.S. airline consolidation, premium-cabin mix, and AAdvantage co-brand mile sales have structurally lifted mid-cycle cash generation; steady $3B+ operating cash flow will pay down the $29B debt stack without dilution, making today's ~$15 equity a mispriced option on deleveraging that will re-rate toward $25+ per share as net debt falls and normalized owner cash compounds.
most_important_missing_fact: Filing-supported maintenance versus growth capex split plus a two-year net-debt reduction schedule funded by owner cash without dilutive refinancing — required to test whether the $4.70/sh OCF proxy is truly reinvestable owner earnings rather than cyclical cash consumed by mandatory fleet capital.
falsifiers: Total debt falls below $24B while operating income exceeds $2.5B for two consecutive quarters without equity issuance.
Trailing four-quarter owner cash per share (operating cash flow minus disclosed maintenance capex) exceeds $5.50 with diluted share count stable within 1%.
SEC filings disclose standalone AAdvantage co-brand economics with incremental margin above 40% and major partner contract renewal visibility through 2030.
specialist_findings: Outside power zone (capital_cycle, moat none, dhando none, ls_algo_underlying; Buffett rules require compounder/infrastructure archetype plus stable/widening moat). Round-two audit: research_response status unresolved — frozen packet lacks year-by-year debt and finance-lease maturities beyond current $3.75B, interest expense, weighted-average coupon, covenant terms, and revolver availability; cannot compute interest coverage or stress dilutive refinancing. Audited all four valuation-proof rows unchanged: midcycle_passenger_network owner_cash_or_dividend_discount base $33.88/sh treats OCF as owner earnings while capex $3.779B exceeded OCF $3.099B; aadvantage_co_brand_option base $8/sh judgment-only with success_probability null; net_financial_claims filing-locked at -$42.67/sh; cycle_leverage_reserve -$9/sh additive judgment reserve not tied to interest burden. No comparables attached. Overlap controls pass (four unique overlap keys, no double_counting_flags). Contract base annualized return withheld at negative intrinsic; high case 8.12% at $15.14. Lawrence synthesis 28.48% diverges from filing-locked component sum and is not usable for this persona without unproven deleveraging proof.
